title: microsorum tuanense
intro: Microsorum tuanense, also known as Tuan fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Southeast Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The leaves of the Tuan fern have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Microsorum tuanense include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
